title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: TALENT MIDDLE SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 102 Christian Avenue Talent, OR 97540 Eligibility: All children 0-18 Hours: During School Year: Monday-Friday 7:30am-3:30pm (541) 618-1300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 618-1300 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Central Point School District and Jackson county SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30pm-3:30pm when school is in session Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TALENT MIDDLE SCHOOL SBHC
